mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings visibility and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in GDP and industrial production signal a contraction in aggregate demand, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with rising interest rates signals monetary policy tightening, increasing equity discount rates and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth indicates robust labor market conditions, boosting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts signal weak demand for residential construction, reducing corporate revenues and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in real sales and housing starts signal weakening consumer demand, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in deterioration periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals supply-side disruptions, reducing corporate output and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in supply shock periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
